name: Dynamic Pricing under Hawkes Process (HJB PDE Solver)
gpu_optimization_points: Mapping the state space J and batch dimension to 1D or 2D CUDA grids.
Using double buffering for the value function U to save memory bandwidth.
Using CUDA Graphs to minimize the overhead of the thousands of sequential kernel launches.
Ensuring coalesced memory accesses when reading interpolated values from the previous time step.
